zh.Longford, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Waleran於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾隆福德時，他的父親William de Waleran30歲，母親Isabel Berkeley30歲。他於1232年與Isabel de Kilpek在英國維爾爾隆福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年84歲。

zh-hans.Longford, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Waleran于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾隆福德时，他的父亲William de Waleran30岁，母亲Isabel Berkeley30岁。他于1232年与Isabel de Kilpek在英国維爾爾隆福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waleran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Walburn
meanings: English (Durham and North Yorkshire): habitational name from Walburn in Downholme (North Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English wala, genitive plural of walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’, + burna ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, the name may derive from the Old French personal name Walebron, perhaps itself from ancient Germanic Waldbrand (wald ‘power, rule’ + brand ‘sword’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Waleran was born about 1190, in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Waleran, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Berkeley, was 30. He married Isabel de Kilpek in 1232, in Longford, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1273, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Waleran est né environ 1190, à Longford, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Waleran, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Berkeley, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Kilpek en 1232, à Longford, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1273, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Waleran um 1190 in Longford, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Waleran 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Berkeley 30. Er hat 1232 in Longford, Wiltshire, England Isabel de Kilpek geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1273 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Waleran è nato il circa 1190 nel Longford, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Waleran, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Berkeley, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Kilpek nel 1232, nel Longford, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1273, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Waleranが約1190年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアロングフォードで生まれた時，父William de Waleranは30歳，母Isabel Berkeleyは30歳であった。1232年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアロングフォードでIsabel de Kilpekと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Waleran(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 론그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Waleran(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Berkeley(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1232년 영국 윌츠히르 론그퍼드에서 Isabel de Kilpek(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Longford, Derbyshire, England: Longford, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Waleran nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Waleran, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Berkeley, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Kilpek em 1232, em Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1273, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Waleran родился около 1190 г. в местности лонгфорд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Waleran было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Berkeley, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Kilpek в 1232 г. в местности лонгфорд, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1273 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Waleran nació aproximadamente 1190, en Longford, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Waleran, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Berkeley, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Isabel de Kilpek en 1232, en Longford, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1273, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
